source: reverse-engineered from 1000-probe citation experiment + crawl contrast (cited vs Google-ranked-not-cited control). See docs/AEO-REVERSE-ENGINEERED-PLAYBOOK-2026-07-21.md

surfaces.own_site_cite_readiness: the ~20% own-domain lever this model scores
surfaces.category_presence: the ~55-60% retrieved-documents lever — scored by answermonk Source Intelligence, not here

product.note: AI cites listicles (43-54%); own site secondary

local_service.note: AI cites the business's own homepage/deep pages (39-46%)

tier0_gates.measured: 0% of cited winners blocked all; gate
0% of cited winners JS-blocked; ~19% of candidates failed to yield citable HTML

tier0_gates.rule: HTTP 200 to GPTBot UA, redirects ok

tier1_factors.detail: median 2920w cited vs 1575w control; >=10 H2, >=12 lists/tables
direct answer in first ~80 words; needs DOM render

tier2_nonfactors.note: controls HIGHER; do NOT reward for citation

scoring: 0 if any tier0 gate fails; else sum(weight*present)/sum(weight_applicable) over page-type-applicable tier1 factors, 0..100. Each contribution renders with its measured_lift for auditability.

engine_seo_carryover.note: fraction of Google p1 domains an engine cites — Google-rank matters most for Gemini, least for ChatGPT

caveats: n=73 pages / 59 domains / 5 categories / single snapshot; lifts directional (FAQ/depth/llms.txt strongest); per-category recalibration recommended; correlation not proven cause; re-derive quarterly.
